event: diagnosed with palpable mass on right breast
treated with chemotherapy (6 courses of ABVD)
younger sister died from metastatic myxoid liposarcoma
no cases of breast or ovarian tumors
pathological examination confirmed invasive ductal carcinoma
staging CT scan negative for distant metastasis
paclitaxel 80 mg/m2 plus carboplatin AUC2 d1-8-15 q28 for 4 cycles
no anthracyclines due to previous exposure
presented to emergency room on May 2, 2017
peripheral blood cultures negative for infection
i.v. catheter tip positive for Klebsiella pneumoniae
CT scan showed resolution of mediastinitis
breast ultrasound showed no change in lump dimension
no lymphocytic infiltration on pre-treatment sample
